creator: tschweikle@gmail.com
text:
FreeBSD 11, 12, 12.1-BETA-2, 12.1-BETA-3, 13-CURRENT are all affected.

VM:
- VMware Workstation 15.0.1, 15.5.0, 15.x.pre
- VirtualBox 6.0.10, 6.0.12
- KVM with Ubuntu 19.10, openSUSE tumbleweed
- MS-Hyperv Windows 2016 Server, 2019 Server (Beta)
- bhyve on FreeBSD 12 before 2019-10
- Intel Core i3, i5, i7, 20GiByte RAM each, 4TB, SATA-SSD

All the same: last line printed while booting: are reports about uhubs found. Sometimes an "random: unblocking device." will show up.

In all cases the kernel waits on for something right before transferring control to init. Systems hang, crashing if I force them to go on.
